dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7374 IH: Housing Without Fear Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Rivas introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Financial Services

form.official-title: To nullify a memorandum of understanding signed by the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development and the Secretary of Homeland Security.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Housing Without Fear Act of 2026.

section.header: Nullification of memorandum of understanding between HUD and DHS
section.text: The Secretary of Housing and Urban Development and the Secretary of Homeland Security may not carry out the memorandum of understanding signed by the Secretaries on March 24, 2025.
